claim.statement: The requested action was refused before downstream consequence could bind.
claim.scope: Single execution attempt in test environment

object.description: A request attempted to move from advisory output to executable action.

authority.approval_basis: Action requires approved role and in-scope destination.

limits: This example does not prove that consequence was blocked.
The available log only suggests an authority check failed.
Without a receipt or downstream status, the correct state is HOLD.
